subcodes.title: Words to the children, spoken on 1912-04-16
subcodes.first_line: These are blessed children. They are very illumined. In their faces the rays of the love of God can be seen. I pray in their behalf
subcodes.first_line_orig: به به چه اطفال مبارکی هستند خیلی نورانیند در وجوهشان
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @education of children; moral education, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @praise and encouragement
